recommendations: Use parameterized queries and input validation to prevent injection attacks
Never hardcode secrets; use environment variables or secret managers
Sanitize user input and use Content-Security-Policy headers
Avoid deserializing untrusted data; use safe alternatives
Implement proper authentication and authorization checks
Use strong authentication mechanisms and secure session management
CRITICAL: Address critical vulnerabilities immediately before deployment
Prioritize fixing high-severity issues in the next sprint
